nodes.context: Armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel, active in northern Mexico.
Major Mexican drug cartel, parent organization of Gente Nueva.
Rival drug cartel based in Ciudad Juárez, fought by Gente Nueva.
Enforcer wing of the Juárez Cartel.
Gang employed by Sinaloa Cartel in the turf war.
Gang employed by Sinaloa Cartel in the turf war.
Rival gang at the service of the Juárez Cartel.
Rival cartel, fought by Gente Nueva in Veracruz.
Cartel that assumed responsibility for the Veracruz massacre.

edges.evidence_quote: Gente Nueva ... function as one of the elite armed wings of the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Gente Nueva is an armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: created to counter, battle and destroy the Juárez Cartel 's influence
edges.context: Gente Nueva was created to fight the Juárez Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: to battle and destroy La Línea which is currently the Juárez Cartel's largest remaining cell
edges.context: Gente Nueva battles La Línea, a cell of the Juárez Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: the gunmen were plotting to kill members of Los Muertos , a rival gang at the service of the Juárez Cartel
edges.context: Gente Nueva attacked Los Muertos, a rival gang allied with Juárez Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: The tit-for-tat fighting between Los Zetas and the Sinaloa cartel started in the Mexican state of Veracruz
edges.context: Gente Nueva, as part of Sinaloa Cartel, fought Los Zetas in Veracruz.

edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa cartel, which had employed the gangs known as Artistas Asesinos and Los Mexicles , along with its armed wing, Gente Nueva
edges.context: Artistas Asesinos fought alongside Gente Nueva as allies.

edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa cartel, which had employed the gangs known as Artistas Asesinos and Los Mexicles , along with its armed wing, Gente Nueva
edges.context: Los Mexicles fought alongside Gente Nueva as allies.

edges.evidence_quote: the Jalisco New Generation Cartel later assumed full responsibility for the massacre and the incursions in the state of Veracruz
edges.context: CJNG claimed responsibility for an attack initially attributed to Gente Nueva, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , Artistas Asesinos , Los Mexicles , Los Antrax
edges.context: Los Antrax is listed as an ally of Gente Nueva in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Zetas , Juárez Cartel , La Línea , Los Muertos , Knights Templar Cartel , CJNG , La Mayiza
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel is listed as a rival of Gente Nueva in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Zetas , Juárez Cartel , La Línea , Los Muertos , Knights Templar Cartel , CJNG , La Mayiza
edges.context: La Mayiza is listed as a rival of Gente Nueva in the infobox.
